name: execute-task-plan
description: SDLC implementation execution: the orchestrator reads and validates task-plan.json, topologically orders tasks, and delegates each runnable task through the registered AgentExecutionPort. Each task returns an agent execution receipt; downstream tasks skip when dependencies fail. Every task's outcome lands in task-execution-log.jsonl under mission evidence.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

params.message: Task plan {{execution.plan_version}} executed: {{execution.succeeded}}/{{execution.total_tasks}} succeeded, {{execution.failed}} failed, {{execution.skipped}} skipped. Log: {{execution.log_path}}
